projects.title: Industry Iceberg (Current Project)
projects.content: Industry Iceberg is a large-scale platform built for the pharmaceutical domain that connects service providers (vendors) with service seekers (users). The system acts as a bridge between companies offering specialized pharma services and businesses looking for those services.
details: Vendors register and provide detailed service info (60+ fields)
Supports services like CMO, CRO, Clinical, Preclinical, Warehousing
Users can search and filter using 30+ filters
Admin team manages and connects vendors & users
projects.tech: ASP.NET Core, Web API, REST APIs, C#, SQL Server, Azure Cloud, React, TypeScript, MUI, Redux Toolkit

projects.title: eDQR (Electronic Development Quality & Regulatory)
projects.content: eDQR is a secure document management platform designed for the pharmaceutical industry. It helps teams create, manage, review, and store regulatory documents in a structured and compliant way.
projects.tech: ASP.NET Core, Web API, REST APIs, C#, SQL Server, Azure Cloud, React, TypeScript, MUI, Redux Toolkit

projects.title: Service Now (Internal Ticketing System)
projects.content: Service Now is an internal ticket tracking system used by employees and clients to report, manage, and resolve issues efficiently.
projects.tech: ASP.NET Core, Web API, C#, SQL Server, React, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3
